emailNotConfirmed: $ auth failed: confirm your email or accept your invite first
rateLimited: $ auth failed: too many attempts — try again later
callbackFailed: $ auth failed: invite or reset link expired — request a new one
sessionInvalid: $ auth failed: session expired — open your invite email again and set your password
resetPasswordSent: password reset email sent — check your inbox
setPasswordHint: create a password to finish setting up your account.
passwordTooShort: password must be at least 8 characters
setPasswordFailed: $ auth failed: could not set password — try again
